meta.summary: TGS-GapCloser gap closing for draft genome assemblies using PacBio, Oxford Nanopore, or preassembled long-read sequences.
meta.description: TGS-GapCloser gap closing for draft genome assemblies using PacBio, Oxford Nanopore, or preassembled long-read sequences.

test: tgsgapcloser --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version : 1.2.1' >/dev/null && tgsgapcloser --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && minimap2 --version | grep -Fx '2.17-r943-dirty' >/dev/null && racon --version 2>&1 | grep -F '1.5.0' >/dev/null && samtools --version | grep -F 'samtools 1.16.1' >/dev/null && test -s /opt/tgsgapcloser/share/java/pilon.jar && java -jar /opt/tgsgapcloser/share/java/pilon.jar --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Pilon version 1.23' >/dev/null && ldd /opt/tgsgapcloser/bin/tgsgapcloserbin/tgsgapcloser | grep -F 'libz.so' >/dev/null && ! ldd /opt/tgsgapcloser/bin/tgsgapcloserbin/tgsgapcloser | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-tgsgapcloser-split && cd /tmp/taf-tgsgapcloser-split && printf '>s1\nACGTACGTNNNNACGTACGT\n' > scaff.fa && tgsseqsplit --input_scaff scaff.fa --prefix split 2> split.err && test -s split.contig && test -s split.orignial_scaff_infos && grep -F '>1 length 8' split.contig >/dev/null && grep -F '>2 length 8' split.contig >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-tgsgapcloser-ne && cd /tmp/taf-tgsgapcloser-ne && cp /opt/tgsgapcloser/share/examples/tgsgapcloser/input.scaff.fasta scaff.fa && cp /opt/tgsgapcloser/share/examples/tgsgapcloser/ont.reads.fasta reads.fa && tgsgapcloser --scaff scaff.fa --reads reads.fa --output smoke --ne --thread 1 --chunk 1 > run.log 2> run.err && test -s smoke.scaff_seqs && test -s smoke.gap_fill_detail && grep -F '>scaffold_1' smoke.scaff_seqs >/dev/null && grep -F 'ALL DONE' run.log >/dev/null
